research_contract.question: Does causal recovery from the actual terminal seed bar restore completed-M1 EUR/USD entry observability without admitting stale hindsight entries?
research_contract.measurement_repair: Initialize each bot-pair cursor from the content-addressed terminal seed bar, fetch every later completed M1 at window start, warm stale missed bars as seed-only, and permit action only on a bar no older than 90 seconds.
unchanged_controls: completed OANDA M1 bid/ask decisions and executable poll-quote fills
fail-closed same-cursor source retry from v3
research_contract.falsifier: Any unsealed gap after the actual terminal seed bar, any stale missed bar allowed to enter, any missing cutoff before a decision, any future watermark, any duplicate cutoff/decision, or any source-blocked new order invalidates the repair.
known_counterevidence: The sealed v2 rooms stopped after two decisions with no durable exception receipt.
The v3 rooms were stopped before their window because their cursor incorrectly skipped the pre-window seed gap; they consumed no quote and created no order.
This wave measures entry observability and causal evidence integrity only; it cannot establish positive expectancy.
The original D and sealed F/v2/v3 waves remain immutable and are not restarted.
